title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six skills for optimizing Claude projects: web scraping for data discovery, knowledge base ingestion, iterative system improvement, collaborative feedback loops, testing workflows, and compound engineering for deployment. The approach is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project to illustrate the repeatable methodology.
